testsuite.name: it.unige.portcommand.agents.WalkInVesselAgentIT
testsuite.system-out: 00:43:16.459 [bootstrap_probe] [bootstrap_probe] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.BootstrapProbeAgent - BootstrapProbeAgent up — running DF self-check 00:43:16.459 [Test worker] [] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.JadeAgentSpawner - Agent bootstrap_probe spawned (class=BootstrapProbeAgent) 00:43:16.480 [bootstrap_probe] [bootstrap_probe] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.BootstrapProbeAgent - DF self-check: 0 'smoke-test' provider(s) 00:43:16.707 [Test worker] [] INFO i.u.portcommand.prolog.PrologEngine - Prolog engine initialised: 5 rule modules, 21 ontology facts, 30 rules (R1–R30) 00:43:16.707 [Test worker] [] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.JadeBootstrap - JADE Main Container up on port 18099 00:43:17.990 [Test worker] [] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.JadeAgentSpawner - Agent fake_hm spawned (class=CounterOfferHarbourMaster) 00:43:18.033 [Test worker] [] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.JadeAgentSpawner - Agent vessel_w001 spawned (class=WalkInVesselAgent) 00:43:18.033 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.agents.WalkInVesselAgent - Starting agent vessel_w001 00:43:18.033 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.agents.WalkInVesselAgent - DF registered: type='vessel' name='vessel_w001' 00:43:18.033 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.agents.WalkInVesselAgent - vessel_w001 arrived (walk-in, NEUTRAL) -> opening proposal 00:43:18.095 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.b.n.OpeningProposalBehaviour - vessel_w001 opened at 2270.6639933301 (13h) -> harbour-master 00:43:18.129 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.b.n.EvaluateCounterOfferBehaviour - vessel_w001: COUNTER at 6000.0 (round 2) 00:43:18.136 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.b.n.EvaluateCounterOfferBehaviour - vessel_w001: ACCEPT at 5500.0 (10h) -> closing deal 00:43:18.147 [vessel_w001] [vessel_w001] INFO i.u.p.b.n.DealClosedBehaviour - vessel_w001: deal closed at 5500.0 (10h) -> CONFIRM + recorded + awaiting berth 00:43:19.416 [Test worker] [] INFO i.u.p.bootstrap.JadeBootstrap - JADE Main Container down
